worthSeeing.title: Montevideo:
worthSeeing.text: Progressive capital with art deco architecture, a long rambla promenade, and vibrant food scene.

worthSeeing.title: Colonia del Sacramento:
worthSeeing.text: Tiny UNESCO-listed colonial town across the river from Buenos Aires.

worthSeeing.title: Punta del Este:
worthSeeing.text: South America's glamorous beach resort, drawing artists, yachties, and sun-seekers.
